creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
#POV: Dubai rain ruins all your outdoor plans, but you’re still liking it. 🌧️

How are you coping up with the rainy days? Our schedule has been drastically affected and we’re shocked that it can rain in Dubai this much. Praying for sunny days, yet taking this as a good sign to slow down and relax. ☕️

Stay safe and dry, everyone!

#DubaiRain #goldsouk #ladyandhersweetescapes #visitUAE #dubaiblogger #uaeblogger #travelblogger #pinayblogger #mydubai #dubai #visitdubai

transcription.text: I think I like when it rains
